seoTitle: How to Create a Free Trello Account
metaDescription: Sign up for Trello with email or Google SSO, verify your account, and set up your first workspace, all without entering a credit card.
intro: Getting started with Trello only takes a few minutes, and the free tier doesn't require any payment information. This guide walks through registering, verifying your account, and setting up your first workspace.

steps.heading: Go to the sign-up page
steps.body: Visit the Trello homepage and click 'Sign Up - It's Free'.

steps.heading: Choose your sign-up method
steps.body: Enter your professional email address or select 'Continue with Google' for a faster single sign-on option.

steps.heading: Set up your Atlassian identity
steps.body: Enter your full name and a secure password on the unified Atlassian identity screen.

steps.heading: Verify your email
steps.body: Check your inbox for the Atlassian verification email and click the security link to confirm your account.

steps.heading: Name your first workspace
steps.body: Return to Trello and name your operational team container, then select a category like Small Business or Engineering.

steps.heading: Skip optional steps if needed
steps.body: You can add colleague emails now or click 'Do this later', and bypass any premium trial promotions to stay on the free tier.

faq.question: Do I need a credit card to sign up for Trello?
faq.answer: No, the free tier registration doesn't require any payment information.

faq.question: Can I sign up with Google instead of an email and password?
faq.answer: Yes, selecting 'Continue with Google' lets you use single sign-on instead of creating a separate password.

faq.question: What happens after I verify my email?
faq.answer: You'll return to Trello to name your first workspace and select a category that fits your use case.

faq.question: Can I invite team members later instead of during sign-up?
faq.answer: Yes, you can click 'Do this later' during onboarding and invite collaborators whenever you're ready.
